fields.meaning: SHA-256 of the exact WordPress _elementor_data storage bytes.
SHA-256 of the losslessly parsed saved source serialized with EDIS-CJ-2 using UTF-8 bytewise object-key order and no Unicode normalization.
Compatibility alias for canonical_saved_source_sha256 retained by WordPress Bundle Schema 3.3.0.
The source artifact file hash is stored externally in package-manifest.json files[].sha256 to avoid a self-hash cycle.
Deterministic identity of the source document scope, not its saved bytes.
Deterministic key derived from exported document_fingerprint, source_path, element ID, document order, and architecture kind.
Hash of the complete element structure record including ID occurrence and uniqueness facts.
Hash of schema identity, semantic evidence projection, semantic diagnostics, and the EDIS-CJ-2 descriptor. Operational IDs and capture/session fields are excluded by policy 1.0.0.
Hash of the complete emitted artifact envelope except this self-referential field. It includes capture time, producer version, operational identifiers, and semantic_payload_sha256.
Declares lossless parser, duplicate-key rejection, numeric-key object preservation, object/array shape preservation, and Unicode ordering used for saved JSON evidence.
